impact: This advances the PP&D guardrail plan by proving missing-information output can be mapped to safe Playwright draft previews while preserving source provenance, redacted values, and fail-closed stop gates before consequential DevHub actions.
summary: Add a fixture-only guardrail-to-Playwright mapping and focused validation test for one missing-information fact, one reversible draft field, and one explicit stop gate.
target_task: Task checkbox-69: Task checkbox-64: Add a guardrail-to-Playwright mapping fixture that links one missing-information fact to one reversible form field and one explicit stop gate, with source evidence IDs and redacted before/after values only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
